_comment: Englische Übersetzungen der 4 statischen Seiten, gelesen von scripts/i18n/polylang-content.mjs. Schlüssel = deutscher Seiten-Slug. Adressen, Telefon, IBAN, Handelsregister-/UID-Nummern bleiben unverändert.

ueber-uns.title: About Us
ueber-uns.content:
Feinspitz — About Us

Feinspitz …

… for explorers and connoisseurs,

because we love (living for) indulgence.…

"Feinspitz" is the Austrian word for a gourmet — it means something like connoisseur!

Feinspitz was founded in 2006 by Angelika Paierl, based in Urdorf/ZH, Switzerland. We specialise in the import and sale of wines, spirits and delicacies

from Austria.

An additional speciality of our extended product range covers HISTAMINE-tested wines, vinegars, verjus & specialities.

The love of indulgence and the search for new flavours are our daily inspiration — and thus the most important reasons to do what we love.

Several times a year we set out on journeys of discovery to find many more exciting delights for you.

Quality and variety are absolutely our top priority!

An oasis for gourmets and connoisseurs!

Opening hours by appointment

We take our time for you!

Arrange an appointment and taste whenever it suits you best.

Or would you prefer advice over the phone? Give us a call. We are glad to advise you personally.

Collection is possible by appointment.

Here you'll find us — Shop & collection warehouse

Bahnhofstrasse 80

CH-8902 Urdorf

Tel: +41 76 588 89 02

Administration

CH-8902 Urdorf

agb.title: Terms and Conditions
agb.content:
Terms and Conditions

Age restriction for alcoholic products:

Due to legal regulations, the sale of alcoholic products to persons under 18 years of age is prohibited. For this reason, the date of birth is a

mandatory field for online orders. Thank you for your understanding.

Order quantities:

The minimum order quantity for wine and bottle shipments is 6 bottles (= 1 case), which may be combined individually.

Delivery:

Deliveries are made exclusively within Switzerland and Liechtenstein.

Prices are based on collection from our Urdorf warehouse and do not include any shipping costs. These are borne by the customer.

Express deliveries are possible and, on request, are carried out for an additional express fee of CHF 30.00.

For online orders & new customers we are happy to deliver against prepayment.

Delivery methods:

Delivery by our in-house delivery service (for express deliveries)

or by Vinolog postal shipping (within approx. 1–3 working days & incl. transport insurance)

Prices:

All prices are in Swiss francs incl. VAT and apply upon immediate cash payment or prepayment.

Means of payment:

We gladly accept the following means of payment:

Cash, EC card, Postcard, PayPal, prepayment against invoice

Defects:

Please inspect your delivery immediately!

Should you, contrary to expectations, discover a defect for any reason, please let us know without delay!

We always strive to find a solution.

Feinspitz taste guarantee:

As we are utterly convinced of our products, we grant our customers the "Feinspitz taste guarantee". This includes a right of return within 14 days of

delivery. Excluded from this guarantee are products no longer in their original packaging or already opened.

Your personal data:

All data is treated confidentially by us and is not passed on to third parties.
